Description: Copy the final selected photos into to_print and write a trip-level manifest describing the final album selection decisions.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create or refresh the to_print/dayXX folder structure for the final selected photos while leaving originals untouched in day folders.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project can create a complete to_print output structure for the final selection without mutating originals.

Stories.StoryDescription: Copy selected photos into to_print/dayXX instead of moving them from their original day folders.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Final selected photos are copied safely into to_print without damaging source folders.

Stories.StoryDescription: Write to_print/selection_manifest.json containing selected photos, source day, source cluster, saved GPT outputs, prompt configuration, and reasons for any unfilled capacity.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The final album output includes a trip-level manifest describing how and why each photo was selected.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add tests for output structure, rerun safety, and preservation of original day photos.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify to_print creation, manifest writing, rerun safety, and no mutation of originals.
